commit_scope: Unblock the prompt gate by repairing the agent-memory consolidation invariants, then add point-of-view visual presence walks for person, place, practice, community, and event nodes. Follow-up: move presence catalog/config out of TypeScript into external locale JSON with English fallback plus German, Spanish, and Indonesian UI overrides. Follow-up: replace build-bundled JSON imports with request-time filesystem loading from configured/runtime content directories so presence data can change without code changes or rebuilds. Follow-up: begin moving remaining external catalog data into DB-backed graph records by replacing the /vision/aligned hardcoded catalog with GET /api/vision/aligned. Follow-up: move the /vision hub concept sections, galleries, blueprint cards, emerging visions, and orientation chips behind GET /api/vision/living-collective/hub. Follow-up: move the /vision/realize core vocabulary, host spaces, context pairs, and dual paths behind GET /api/vision/living-collective/realize. Follow-up: move the remaining repeatable /vision/realize card/list groups behind the same graph-backed endpoint.

phase_gate.blocked_reason: Runtime slice is locally validated but not committed, pushed, opened as a PR, or checked in CI.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Visitors can now open /presence-walk/{kind} for person, place, practice, community, and event point-of-view surfaces, then continue into named /presence-walk/node/{slug} pages whose first screen uses node-specific presentation, official/brand imagery where available, source phrases, and focus language. Anne Tucker now opens with her source beach portrait, curved white field, coral account/free-healing language, and healer copy; Liquid Bloom now opens with the source blue patterned header, logo, long nav, translucent biography block, and three current release covers. Those two visual languages are rendered from presence source-visual data and reusable templates, with no Anne/Liquid slug-specific branch or content hardcoding in the route component. Remaining display copy, detail section definitions, people-directory groups, default page metadata, composition class maps, brand surface class maps, and motif layer definitions now live in data modules instead of route/page code. /vision/aligned now reads communities, host spaces, gatherings, practices, and networks from graph nodes through /api/vision/aligned instead of embedded external catalog arrays; empty graph groups render explicit empty states. /vision now reads hub sections, galleries, blueprint cards, emerging visions, and orientation words from graph nodes through /api/vision/living-collective/hub instead of embedded hub catalog arrays. /vision/realize now reads core vocabulary, host-space patterns, context comparisons, dual-path invitations, fastest opportunities, shell transformations, seasons, abundance flows, existing structures, and seeds from /api/vision/living-collective/realize instead of embedded repeatable arrays; remaining inline realize content is long-form narrative copy for a later page-copy slice. The memory service gate still preserves no-timestamp recall and shorter-than-source consolidation.
test_flows: Open each /presence-walk/{kind} route and confirm the visual hero, node type, story, path, vision, and why-this-visual copy render.
Use the presence-walk tabs to move between person, place, practice, community, and event perspectives.
Open named node routes and confirm the first screen uses brand/source imagery, a source phrase, the node focus, and a non-standardized composition before attunement notes below the fold.
Open Anne Tucker and Liquid Bloom and confirm their first-screen presentation uses source visual language rather than the shared Coherence node template.
Open /people and confirm the Walk each point of view entry point is available.
Run the agent memory loop tests and confirm recall has no timestamp marker while consolidation output token estimate is smaller than input.
Create graph nodes in the test DB for /vision/aligned and confirm GET /api/vision/aligned returns only scoped DB-backed records.
Create graph nodes in the test DB for /vision and confirm GET /api/vision/living-collective/hub returns only scoped domain/page records.

Create graph nodes in the test DB for /vision/realize and confirm GET /api/vision/living-collective/realize returns only scoped domain/page records for vocabulary, host spaces, context pairs, and dual paths.

Create graph nodes in the test DB for /vision/realize expansion groups and confirm GET /api/vision/living-collective/realize returns fastest opportunities, shell transformations, seasons, abundance flows, existing structures, and seeds.
